divergent_child.mechanism: Use realized gap/volatility-convexity stress rather than duration/gold/sector/credit spread proxies.
divergent_child.title: ETF macro-stress allocator using volatility-of-volatility and gap-risk proxies

bad_result_policy.note: Rejected result: no refinement/extension/direct inversion suggested; one genuinely divergent idea only.

command: credentials sourced from profile secret file (redacted); /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/.venv/bin/qfa backtest run /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/models/yield-credit-stress-etf-allocation-v1/model.py --symbols SPY,QQQ,IWM,TLT,IEF,GLD,HYG,LQD,XLP,XLU,XLV,XLY,XLI,XLK,XLF --start 2021-01-04 --end 2025-12-15 --timeframe 1Day --initial-cash 100000 --db <temporary-sqlite-db>

costs_slippage.handling: qfa CLI exposes no transaction-cost/slippage parameter; post-cost proxy subtracts 5 bps times one-way target-weight turnover from daily returns.

data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa AlpacaGateway; no CSV; --data-csv was not used

db_used.retention_note: Temporary SQLite DBs were deleted after qfa JSON outputs were captured.

decision_rationale: Rejected: despite positive median random-window post-cost Sharpe, the 2021-2022 lower-tail drawdown exceeded 20%, violating the defensive macro-stress falsifier.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of daily qfa equity returns from retained latest.json equity curves when available
